video_details.title: Ep. 5 - 🐐 Daytrader Takes Ayahuasca, Finds God, and Becomes a Monk! 🧘
video_details.description:
Just kidding folks! I'm not becoming a monk and will still be here dropping 🔥 trading wisdom on you all! :)

In this video I discuss my recent experience attending a Soltara ayahuasca retreat in Costa Rica. What the experience is like, what insights I walked away with, and whether I'd recommend it... here is my lowdown on what it was like to go way up high into the clouds of consciousness!

This is a video of one of our shamans, Maestra Maricela, singing an Icaro:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3wy_TqxsyDA

For every view this video gets, I'll donate $1 to ayahuasca research and lobbying efforts so please share away!

#lancebreitstein #theonelanceb
